/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/zlib/lib CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/benchmark_main.cpp.o -o benchmarks  ../core/store/libcore_store.a ../core/events/libcore_events.a ../core/features/libcore_features.a ../core/inference/libcore_inference.a ../core/store/libcore_store.a ../core/features/libcore_features.a ../core/events/libcore_events.a
